title: Malvastrum ribifolium

uses: Malvastrum ribifolium, also known as the Rivermallow, has been traditionally used in folk medicine. The plant's leaves, roots, and stems are used to treat various health issues. In traditional medicine, Malvastrum ribifolium is used to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's anti-inflammatory properties are also used to treat skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Furthermore, Malvastrum ribifolium is used as a natural remedy to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation.
